title: The Central Silk Board Act, 1948
full_text: The Central Silk Board Act, 1948 केन्‍द्रीय रेशम बोर्ड अधिनियम,1948 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 194861 Act Number: 61 Enactment Date: 1948-09-20 Act Year: 1948 Short Title: The Central Silk Board Act, 1948 Hindi Title: केन्‍द्रीय रेशम बोर्ड अधिनियम,1948 Long Title: An Act to provide for the development under Central control of the silk industry and for that purpose to establish a Central Silk Board. Ministry: Ministry of Textiles Enforcement Date: 20-09-1948 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Central Silk Board Act, 1948 Show all section Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration as to expediency of Union control. Show Related Subordinates Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Constitution of the Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Vice-Chairperson and Standing Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Secretary of the Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Functions of the Board. Power to notify kinds or varieties of silk-worm seeds. Show Related Subordinates Section 8D. Hybrid Authorisation Committee. Section 8E. Registration Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 8F. Section 14. Penalties Section 14A. Penalty for contravention of sections 8C and 8E. Section 15. Omitted Section 15A. Omitted. Section 16. Bar of legal proceedings. Section 16A. Effect of Act and rules, etc., inconsistent with other enactments. Section 17. Omitted..
